title: lycium vulgare var. ruthenicum
intro: Lycium vulgare var. ruthenicum, also known as the Wolf's Bane or Wolf's Garlic, is a variety of the Lycium vulgare plant, a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lycium vulgare var. ruthenicum include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting the immune system and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Lycium vulgare var. ruthenicum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
